word: H865 - אֶתְמֹול - ʼethmôwl - eth-mole' - Before time

sections.paragraph:
Original: אתמוּל אתמול אתמול

Transliteration: 'ethmôl 'ithmôl 'ethmûl

Phonetic: eth-mole'

BDB Definition:

  1. yesterday, recently, formerly
    1. yesterday
    2. formerly (figuratively)
    3. from yesterday, already (in phrase)
  2. (TWOT +) before, before that time, before the time, heretofore, of late, of old, these days, time(s) past

Origin: probably from H853 or H854 and H4136

TWOT entry: 2521

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
